event_name: Arkansas Arts Center: New Summer Exhibition Opening

seo.title: Arkansas Arts Center Summer Exhibition Opening 2026 | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: The Arkansas Arts Center opens its summer exhibition program in the newly expanded facility at MacArthur Park. Free opening reception and tours.

description: The Arkansas Arts Center opens its summer exhibition season with a public opening reception at the newly expanded museum in MacArthur Park. The AAC — the state's principal visual arts museum — has undergone a major expansion and renovation, and the summer opening showcases the full scope of the new facility and collection. Opening night includes curator-led tours, live musical performance in the atrium, and complimentary light refreshments. The summer program typically features both works from the permanent collection and a major traveling exhibition. General admission is free at the AAC.
